CREATE TABLE maps_example (id INT, map_col MAP(INTEGER, STRING));
SELECT id, cardinality(map_col) FROM maps_example WHERE cardinality(map_col) > 0;
SELECT id FROM maps_example WHERE cardinality(map_col) = 0;
SELECT id, cardinality(map([10, 20, 30], ['x', 'y', 'z'])) AS map_size FROM maps_example;
SELECT id, cardinality(map_col) FROM maps_example WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM maps_example WHERE cardinality(map_col) < 3);
CREATE TABLE additional_maps (uid INT, another_map MAP(STRING, STRING));
SELECT m.id, m.map_col, a.another_map, cardinality(m.map_col) + cardinality(a.another_map) AS combined_cardinality FROM maps_example m JOIN additional_maps a ON m.id = a.uid;
